Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

STT 1, 022 [SB Anzu 2][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
oo  (traces of 1 line)
o 2'2'

⸢šit⸣-ra-⸢aḫ maḫ-ri DINGIR-MEŠ⸣ [...]

(Belet-ili saying to Ninurta:) 'Make yourself splendid before the gods, [...].'

o 3'3'

zik-ra um-mi-šu iš-[me-e ...]

[...] he heard his mother's utterance,

o 4'4'

iq-ru-ur! ir-⸢ta⸣-ub ša₂-du-us-⸢su⸣ [x x]

he quivered, he became furious, [...] to his mountain.

o 5'5'

qar-ra-du ⸢uš⸣-te-<eṣ>-bi-ta 7 im-ḫul-⸢li?⸣ [(...)]

The hero hitched up the 7 destructive winds [(...)].

o 6'6'

id-ku a-na-⸢an⸣-tu na-an-⸢dur-ta?⸣ tu-⸢qu⸣-[un-tu x x]

He raised ferocious war, [...] combat,

o 7'7'

⸢tam⸣-ḫa-⸢ru-uš i?-du-uš-šu i-qu⸣-[lu ...]

for conflict at his side [...] attended.

o 8'8'

⸢i-na ša₂-ḫa-at⸣ KURi an-za-a dNIN.URTA [...]

On the side of the mountain Anzu (and) Ninurta [...],

o 9'9'

i-mur-šu-ma an-za-a i-ru-[ba-aš₂-šu]

Anzu saw him, he became furious with him.

o 10'10'

ik-ṣu-uṣ ki-ma u₄-mi me-lam-ma-[šu ...]

He ground his teeth like a storm-demon, [...] with his fearsome radiance,

o 11'11'

ut-ta-ar ki-ma lab-bi le-[qi₂ x x]

he was roaring like a lion, possessed [...]:

o 12'12'

at-bal-ma kul-lat ka-li-⸢šu₂⸣-[nu x x]

'I took away absolutely all [...],

o 13'13'

⸢u₃ te⸣-re-e-⸢ti ša₂⸣ [...]

'and the directives of [...].'

(rest of obverse missing)
(missing)
